context: Tests whether the agent challenges a technology choice by asking why that specific technology over a named alternative, and probing a realistic 2-year future scenario — rather than accepting the choice uncritically.

checklist.name: Does not accept the technology
checklist.description: review.md does NOT simply validate or endorse the technology choice without questioning it

checklist.name: Names a specific alternative
checklist.description: review.md asks why this technology over at least one specifically named alternative (not a vague 'other options')

checklist.name: Asks 2-year scenario question
checklist.description: review.md asks what happens in 2 years — or uses a realistic future scenario (team growth, data volume, migration, vendor change) to probe the decision

checklist.name: Scenario is specific
checklist.description: The 2-year or future scenario posed is concrete and specific (e.g. 'when the team doubles', 'when data volume hits X') rather than generic ('in the future')

checklist.name: Question is direct
checklist.description: review.md directly asks 'why this over [alternative]?' or equivalent — not merely implies it
